subject: ess
title: 17N.1.SL.TZ0.1
question_html:
The resource booklet provides information on Iceland. Use the resource booklet and your own studies to answer the following.

State one biome found in Iceland.
solution_html:
This question requires “Resource Booklet - Nov 2017 SL paper 1”, available under the "your tests" tab > supplemental materials.

tundra/arctic tundra/taiga/boreal forest/birch forest/coniferous forest;

Do not accept only ‘forests/temperate forest/woodlands/ice caps/ glaciers/mountains’.
examiners_html: A significant proportion of candidates gave tundra as a correct response. Common error was to suggest ice caps or mountains as a biome or to give a response that was too generalised eg forests.
